title: Making Memories Photo Album Beach Sea Design Family Holiday Albums Scrapbook Holds 104 Photographs 5" x 7" Photos
features: Making Memories - Family Holiday Photo Album For 104 x 5" x 7" Photos
With room for 104 5" x 7" photographs, this album is spacious enough to accommodate your most cherished moments. From family holidays to romantic getaways and sun-soaked adventures
Crafted with precision and care, our photo album is made with high-quality materials to ensure your photos stay safe and well-preserved for years to come
Contains double sided slip in pockets to hold 104 photos making the album simple to use
